content.problem: Aura was entering a saturated market and needed a brand identity that felt simultaneously clinical and organic.
content.strategy: We positioned Aura at the intersection of science and nature, utilizing a stark, minimal typographic system paired with fluid, organic 3D imagery.
content.identityDevelopment: The logo was custom-drawn to feel sharp yet welcoming. The color palette was restrained to off-whites and clinical grays, allowing the vibrant product textures to stand out.
content.outcome: Aura sold out their initial production run within 48 hours of launch.
